wizard.note.select.description: First, choose what you want to do for the note.
wizard.note_create_child.parent.descript: Select the parent note for the child note. The rest of the flow is the same as normal note creation.
wizard.note_create_child.parent.label: Parent Note *
wizard.note_create.purpose.description: Enter one management purpose. On the next screen you decide the note name, then choose the field setup method.
wizard.note_create.purpose.label: Purpose *
wizard.note_create.purpose.placeholder: Example: I want to manage inquiry intake information
wizard.note_create.note_title.descriptio: Enter the note name shown to users. Codex will decide the internal db name later.
wizard.note_create.note_title.label: Note Name *
wizard.note_create.project.description: A candidate guessed from the purpose is prefilled. Adjust it if needed.
wizard.note_create.project.label: Target Project *
wizard.note_create.menu.description: This is the left menu label. Use a clear name that fits the purpose.
wizard.note_create.menu.label: Menu Name *
wizard.note_create.display.description: Choose where each field should appear on the standard screens.
wizard.table_create.form.description: Enter the requirements for adding a new table, and generate the execution prompt to send to Codex Terminal.
wizard.table_create.form.menu_name_place: If empty, the table name will be used
wizard.note_create.fields.description: You can let Codex suggest fields automatically or specify them manually. In manual mode you can keep adding fields from the helper form below.
wizard.note_create.fields.title: Title
wizard.note_create.fields.example: Example: Name (text) / Amount (number) / Memo (markdown) / Status (dropdown / Not started,In progress,Done)
wizard.note_create.preview.field_auto: Codex will propose fields from the purpose
wizard.note_create.preview.help: Codex will handle db name selection / db creation / db_fields creation / screen_fields setup.

wizard.note_edit.step_basic: Wizard: Note Settings Change / Basic Settings (3/4)

wizard.note_edit.table.label: Target Note *
wizard.note_edit.basic.description: Only basic settings are changed here. Advanced settings will be separated into another wizard later.
wizard.note_edit.preview.help: Codex will update the target db record and verify the impact.
wizard.note_delete.table.description: Select the note you want to delete. The deletion targets both the note definition and related data.
wizard.note_delete.table.label: Note to Delete *

wizard.table_change.screen_done.descript: Continue by refreshing the whole screen.
